heading: Abraham Lincoln Birthplace National Historical Park
label: 217b Abraham Lincoln Birthplace National Historical Park

children.heading: Designation
children.label: a Designation
children.text: The Abraham Lincoln Birthplace National Historic Site in the State of Kentucky shall be known and designated as the “Abraham Lincoln Birthplace National Historical Park”.

children.heading: References
children.label: b References
children.text: Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the Abraham Lincoln Birthplace National Historic Site shall be deemed to be a reference to the “Abraham Lincoln Birthplace National Historical Park”.
